text:
- Update to 2.2
- Updated Makefile to use PYDISTUTILS instead of GMAKE
- Updated MASTER_SITES
- Extended pkg-descr and updated WWW
- Added pkg-message with instructions for installing additional plugins
- Removed existing patches (no longer needed) and qlscrobbler.py plugin
- Added patch to insure man pages are installed to proper location (not share/man)
- Added patch to prevent syntax error (non-critical) during install

Removed files:
- files/patch-Makefile
- files/patch-po-Makefile
- files/qlscrobbler.py

Added files:
- pkg-message
- files/patch-gdist__man.py
- files/patch-quodlibet__qltk__config.py
